title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a local bus service.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did you hear the council might change the number 6 bus route? || Man: Yes, and I hope they do. It goes past my flat, but it's often late, especially after work. || Woman: Would the new route be quicker? || Man: Maybe, but that's not the main thing. [8]If it stopped outside the hospital, my dad could use it for his appointments without changing buses[/8]. That would really help him. || Woman: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you hear the council might change the number 6 bus route?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, and I hope they do. It goes past my flat, but it's often late, especially after work.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Would the new route be quicker?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Maybe, but that's not the main thing. If it stopped outside the hospital, my dad could use it for his appointments without changing buses. That would really help him.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think.

questions.question: Why does the man support the change?

options.A: It would be useful for a family member.
options.B: It would make his journey to work faster.
options.C: It would stop closer to his flat.

questions.explanation: The man says the new stop would help his dad get to hospital appointments.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a photography exhibition.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Did you go to the photography exhibition on Saturday? || Man: Yes. I nearly didn't because the tickets were expensive, but I'm glad I went. || Woman: Were the pictures good? || Man: Some were amazing. The landscapes were beautiful, but [9]what really impressed me was the way the photographer showed ordinary people at work[/9]. Those pictures felt honest and full of life. || Man: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you go to the photography exhibition on Saturday?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. I nearly didn't because the tickets were expensive, but I'm glad I went.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Were the pictures good?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Some were amazing. The landscapes were beautiful, but what really impressed me was the way the photographer showed ordinary people at work. Those pictures felt honest and full of life.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

questions.question: What impressed the man most about the exhibition?

options.C: the low price of the tickets

questions.explanation: He says the photographs showing ordinary people at work really impressed him.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a music lesson.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How's your guitar lesson going? Can you play a song yet? || Woman: A simple one, yes. The teacher is patient, and I practise most evenings. || Man: That sounds good. || Woman: It is, but [10]I wish the lesson was earlier because after college I'm so tired that I don't take everything in[/10]. I don't want to change teachers, though. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How's your guitar lesson going? Can you play a song yet?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: A simple one, yes. The teacher is patient, and I practise most evenings.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds good.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It is, but I wish the lesson was earlier because after college I'm so tired that I don't take everything in. I don't want to change teachers, though.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: What problem does the woman have with the lesson?

options.B: She has too little time to practise.
options.C: It is at an inconvenient time.

questions.explanation: She says she wishes the lesson was earlier because she is tired after college.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about cycling to work.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: You're still cycling to work every day, aren't you? || Man: Most days. I thought the traffic would make it frightening, but the cycle path is separate from the road. || Woman: So you recommend it? || Man: Yes. [11]The best thing is arriving feeling awake instead of half asleep after the bus journey[/11]. It doesn't save much money because repairs are expensive, but I feel better. || Man: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: You're still cycling to work every day, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Most days. I thought the traffic would make it frightening, but the cycle path is separate from the road.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So you recommend it?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. The best thing is arriving feeling awake instead of half asleep after the bus journey. It doesn't save much money because repairs are expensive, but I feel better.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

questions.question: What does the man like most about cycling to work?

options.A: It makes him feel more energetic.
options.B: It saves him a lot of money.
options.C: It keeps him away from traffic.

questions.explanation: He says the best thing is arriving feeling awake.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a new café.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you tried the café in the library? || Woman: Yes, yesterday. The coffee was fine, and the cakes looked lovely, but it isn't really a place to chat. || Man: Why not? Is the music loud? || Woman: No, [12]there are only three small tables, so people are standing close to you waiting for a seat[/12]. I felt I had to leave quickly. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you tried the café in the library?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, yesterday. The coffee was fine, and the cakes looked lovely, but it isn't really a place to chat.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Why not? Is the music loud?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, there are only three small tables, so people are standing close to you waiting for a seat. I felt I had to leave quickly.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

questions.question: What does the woman say about the café?

options.B: There is not enough space to sit.

questions.explanation: She says there are only three small tables and people are waiting for a seat.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a jacket she bought online.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I ordered a jacket online because the colour looked perfect in the picture. It arrived quickly, and it fits quite well. I don't mind that it's a little thinner than I expected, because it's for spring. However, [13]the colour is much darker than it appeared on the website, so it doesn't match the dress I wanted to wear it with[/13]. I'll probably send it back. || Speaker: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I ordered a jacket online because the colour looked perfect in the picture. It arrived quickly, and it fits quite well. I don't mind that it's a little thinner than I expected, because it's for spring. However, the colour is much darker than it appeared on the website, so it doesn't match the dress I wanted to wear it with. I'll probably send it back.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

questions.question: Why is the woman unhappy with the jacket?

options.B: It is too thin for the weather.
options.C: It is not the colour she wanted.

questions.explanation: She says the colour is much darker than it appeared online.
